autoRecall.description: Retrieve and inject memories before each turn (default: true)

autoCapture.description: Extract and store memories after each turn (default: true)

autoSyncFiles.description: Sync memory markdown files on startup and after each turn (default: true)

autoSyncTopics.description: Auto-configure memory topics on startup (default: true)

topK.description: Max memories to retrieve per query (default: 10)

maxDistance.description: Max similarity distance for recall. Lower = stricter (default: no filtering)

ttlSeconds.description: Auto-expire memories after this many seconds (default: no expiry)

introspection.description: Metadata in auto-recalled memories: 'off' = just facts, 'scores' = facts + similarity score (default: scores)
